Our Story

Where Comfort Meets Grandeur

Nestled in the heart of Ahmedabad, Hotel New Empire stands as a symbol of refined luxury and impeccable hospitality. Located on the 3rd floor of the prestigious Devpriya Complex, opposite Titanium City Center, we offer an unparalleled experience in the city's most vibrant district.

From the moment you step through our doors, every detail has been thoughtfully curated to ensure your stay is nothing short of extraordinary.

Services

World-Class Amenities

Every service at Hotel New Empire is crafted to complement your lifestyle. Whether you're here for business or leisure, our facilities ensure every moment of your stay exceeds expectations.

🍽️
Fine Dining
Multi-cuisine restaurant serving authentic Indian and international flavours.
🛁
Luxury Bath
Premium bath amenities and rainfall showers in every room.
📶
High-Speed WiFi
Complimentary fiber-optic internet throughout the hotel.
🚗
Valet Parking
Secure parking and 24-hour valet service available.
💼
Business Centre
Fully equipped meeting rooms and conference facilities.
🛎️
24/7 Concierge
Round-the-clock assistance for all your needs.
🧹
Housekeeping
Daily turn-down service with meticulous attention to detail.
🏋️
Fitness Centre
Modern gym equipped with latest fitness equipment.
